sentences.target: Ich muss den Schlüssel ins Schloss stecken.
sentences.reading: /ɪç mʊs deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ɪns ʃlɔs ˈʃtɛkən/

translations.de: Ich muss den Schlüssel ins Schloss stecken.
translations.ipa: /ɪç mʊs deːn ˈʃlʏsəl ɪns ʃlɔs ˈʃtɛkən/
translations.en: I have to put the key in the lock.
translations.es: Tengo que meter la llave en la cerradura.
translations.fr: Je dois mettre la clé dans la serrure.
translations.it: Devo inserire la chiave nella serratura.
translations.ru: Мне нужно вставить ключ в замок.
translations.pt: Tenho que colocar a chave na fechadura.
translations.he: אני צריך להכניס את המפתח למנעול.
translations.vi: Tôi phải tra chìa khóa vào ổ khóa.
translations.ar: يجب أن أدخل المفتاح في القفل.
translations.nl: Ik moet de sleutel in het slot steken.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно вставити ключ у замок.
translations.hu: Be kell dugnom a kulcsot a zárba.
translations.hi: मुझे चाबी ताले में लगानी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να βάλω το κλειδί στην κλειδαριά.
translations.nb: Jeg må sette nøkkelen i låsen.
translations.id: Aku harus memasukkan kunci ke lubang kunci.
translations.sv: Jag måste sätta i nyckeln i låset.
translations.ro: Trebuie să bag cheia în broască.
translations.da: Jeg skal sætte nøglen i låsen.
translations.ja: 鍵を鍵穴に差し込まないといけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular present; expresses necessity and licenses a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Schlüssel' as direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative direct object of the infinitive 'stecken'.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'das'; marks direction into something and governs accusative.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition 'ins' (accusative due to directional 'in').
Bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'muss'; denotes the action of inserting the key into the lock.

sentences.target: Du kannst den Stecker in die Steckdose stecken.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst deːn ˈʃtɛkɐ ɪn diː ˈʃtɛkdoːzə ˈʃtɛkən/

translations.de: Du kannst den Stecker in die Steckdose stecken.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst deːn ˈʃtɛkɐ ɪn diː ˈʃtɛkdoːzə ˈʃtɛkən/
translations.en: You can put the plug into the outlet.
translations.es: Puedes enchufar el cargador en la toma de corriente.
translations.fr: Tu peux brancher le chargeur à la prise.
translations.it: Puoi inserire la spina nella presa.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把插头插进插座。
translations.yue: 你可以把插頭插入插座。
translations.pt: Você pode ligar o carregador na tomada.
translations.he: אתה יכול לחבר את המטען לשקע.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cắm phích vào ổ cắm điện.
translations.nl: Je kunt de stekker in het stopcontact steken.
translations.uk: Ти можеш вставити вилку в розетку.
translations.hu: Be tudod dugni a dugót a konnektorba.
translations.hi: तुम प्लग को सॉकेट में लगा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βάλεις το φις στην πρίζα.
translations.nb: Du kan sette støpselet i stikkontakten.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memasukkan steker ke stopkontak.
translations.sv: Du kan sätta i kontakten i uttaget.
translations.da: Du kan sætte stikket i stikkontakten.
translations.ja: プラグをコンセントに差してもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 2nd person singular present; expresses ability and licenses a bare infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Stecker' as direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative direct object of the infinitive 'stecken'.
Preposition marking location or direction; with accusative here indicates motion into something.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Steckdose' as prepositional object of 'in'.
Feminine noun; accusative object of the preposition 'in' (directional use).
Bare infinitive complement selected by the modal 'kannst'; denotes the action of inserting the plug into the socket.

sentences.target: Der Aufzug bleibt heute wieder stecken.

translations.de: Der Aufzug bleibt heute wieder stecken.
translations.en: The elevator is getting stuck again today.
translations.es: El ascensor se vuelve a atascar hoy.
translations.it: L’ascensore si blocca di nuovo oggi.
translations.pt: O elevador está emperrando de novo hoje.
translations.vi: Thang máy hôm nay lại bị kẹt.
translations.nl: De lift loopt vandaag weer vast.
translations.hi: लिफ्ट आज फिर फँस रही है.
translations.nb: Heisen setter seg fast igjen i dag.
translations.ro: Liftul se blochează din nou azi.
translations.da: Elevatoren sætter sig fast igen i dag.
translations.ja: エレベーターが今日はまた止まっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Aufzug' as subject.
Masculine noun; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; part of the separable compound verb 'steckenbleiben' together with 'stecken'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the time of the event.
Adverb expressing repetition; modifies the verb phrase.
Separated lexical component of the compound verb 'steckenbleiben'; completes the meaning 'to get stuck'.

translations.fr: Je laisse la carte en place.
translations.pt: Vou deixar o cartão no leitor.
translations.vi: Tôi để thẻ lại trong khe cắm.
translations.hi: मैं कार्ड को स्लॉट में ही छोड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Aku biarkan kartu tetap di slot.
translations.ja: カードを挿したままにしておく。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; part of the separable compound verb 'steckenlassen' together with 'stecken', conveying the sense of leaving something inserted.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Karte' as direct object.
Feminine noun; accusative direct object of 'lasse'.
Separated lexical component of the compound verb 'steckenlassen'; complements 'lasse' to mean 'leave (the card) inserted'.
